query: Apple annual report 2024 net sales 391 billion fiscal 2024
answer: Apple's 2024 net sales reached $391 billion, up 2% YoY, with iPhone sales making up over half of the revenue. Services revenue grew 13% YoY to $96.2 billion. Hardware sales excluding iPhone totaled $93.7 billion.

results.title: Breaking Down Apple's Revenue in 2024
results.snippet: Breaking Down Apple's Revenue in 2024 - Voronoi. # Breaking Down Apple's Revenue in 2024. Breaking Down Apple's Revenue in 2024. This infographic breaks down Apple’s **$391 billion** in revenue for the fiscal year ended September 28, 2024, highlighting revenue by product category and geographic region. * The iPhone remains Apple’s biggest revenue driver, accounting for **$201.2 billion** or **51%** of total net sales. * Services revenue—including the App Store, iCloud, and Apple Music—hit **$96.2 billion**, up **13%** year-over-year. * Hardware sales besides the iPhone (Mac, iPad, and Wearables) collectively generated **$93.7 billion**, or 24% of total revenue. Apple’s overall revenue increased by a steady **2%** from FY 2023 levels. However, revenue growth from most product categories remained flat, with iPhone sales increasingly marginally relative to 2023. Looking at revenue changes by region reveals that net sales increased in most regions except China, where Apple’s revenue fell by **8%** YoY to around **$67 billion**. On the contrary, Apple’s European revenue grew by **7%** in FY 2024.

results.title: Apple's Revenue Hits $391 Billion, Net Income $94 Billion in Year ...
results.snippet: # Apple’s Revenue Hits $391 Billion, Net Income $94 Billion in Year Ending Q3 2024. For the year ending in Q3 2024, Apple’s revenue reached $391.0 billion, marking a 2.0% year-over-year increase, while net income declined by 3.4% to $93.7 billion. Since 1995, Apple has achieved a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.1% in revenue and 20.5% in net income, underscoring its robust long-term growth trajectory. ## Recent Posts. results.title: #Apple's annual revenue grew by 2% to $391 billion in the financial ...
results.snippet: #Apple's annual revenue grew by 2% to $391 billion in the financial year ended Sept 28, 2024, up from $383 billion in the financial year
